	method = farming
	category = raw_material
	color = rgb { 184 125 74 }
	default_market_price = 4
	transport_cost = 3

	demand_add = {
		nobles = 0.012
		burghers = 0.010
		clergy = 0.002
	}

	origin_in_old_world = yes
	custom_tags = { old_world_goods }
	no_demand_if_no_market_availability = yes
}
